infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to show nearby incidents and road conditions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to track maintenance crews.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to report incidents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to attach images to incident reports.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow STMS to access your photos to attach images to incident reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow STMS to use your camera to capture incident photos.
